title: Agent Skills
author: Simon Willison
content:
Agent Skills. Anthropic have turned their skills mechanism into an "open standard", which I guess means it lives in an independent agentskills/agentskills GitHub repository now? I wouldn't be surprised to see this end up in the AAIF, recently the new home of the MCP specification.

The specification itself lives at agentskills.io/specification, published from docs/specification.mdx in the repo.

It is a deliciously tiny specification - you can read the entire thing in just a few minutes. It's also quite heavily under-specified - for example, there's a metadata field described like this:

Clients can use this to store additional properties not defined by the Agent Skills spec

We recommend making your key names reasonably unique to avoid accidental conflicts

And an allowed-skills field:

Experimental. Support for this field may vary between agent implementations

Example:

allowed-tools: Bash(git:*) Bash(jq:*) Read

The Agent Skills homepage promotes adoption by OpenCode, Cursor,Amp, Letta, goose, GitHub, and VS Code. Notably absent is OpenID, who are quietly tinkering with skills but don't appear to have formally announced their support just yet.
aiSummary: Anthropic 已将其内部的“技能机制”转变为开放标准“Agent Skills”，旨在增强 AI 代理的互操作性。
oneSentenceSummary: Anthropic 已将其内部的“技能机制”转变为开放标准“Agent Skills”，旨在增强 AI 代理的互操作性。
summary: 本文介绍了 Anthropic 将其内部 AI 代理“技能机制”开源并命名为“Agent Skills”这一独立标准的举措。它指出，这一新标准最终可能会被纳入 AAIF (Agentic AI Foundation)。Agent Skills 规范被强调为极其简洁且易于阅读，但它在某些“规范不完善”的字段上存在不足，例如 `metadata` 和 `allowed-skills`，这些字段可以通过更清晰的定义来改进。文章指出，包括 OpenCode、Cursor、Amp、Letta、Goose、GitHub 和 VS Code 在内的多家公司已经采用了该标准。然而，它明显遗漏了 OpenAI，尽管 OpenAI 已知在秘密研究类似技术，但尚未正式宣布支持。在这种背景下，Agent Skills 被定位为定义 AI 代理能力的基础性、可互操作的框架。

mainPoints.point: Agent Skills 是 Anthropic 针对其内部“技能机制”推出的独立开放标准。
mainPoints.explanation: 这项举措旨在标准化 AI 代理技能定义和互操作性，有可能建立一个通用的行业协议。从内部机制转向开放标准，标志着在 AI 代理生态系统内推动更广泛的采用和协作开发。

mainPoints.point: Agent Skills 规范简洁，但包含某些定义不明确的字段。
mainPoints.explanation: 虽然其简洁性有助于快速理解和采用，但 `metadata` 和 `allowed-skills` 等字段缺乏精确定义，可能在实施和生态系统开发过程中导致歧义或兼容性问题。简化性与清晰度之间的平衡对于广泛接受至关重要。

mainPoints.point: 该标准已获得多家公司的支持，促进了一个互联互通的 AI 代理生态系统。
mainPoints.explanation: OpenCode、GitHub 和 VS Code 等实体的广泛采用对于 Agent Skills 成为通用行业标准至关重要。这可能会降低开发障碍，加速 AI 代理领域的创新和应用程序开发，从而促进一个更具凝聚力和功能性的生态系统。

keyQuotes: Anthropic 已将其技能机制转变为“开放标准”
它是一个极其简洁的规范——你只需几分钟就能通读全文。
Agent Skills 的主页展示了 OpenCode、Cursor、Amp、Letta、Goose、GitHub 和 VS Code 对其的采用。
